snippets.C0014:
# Caso: Validar paréntesis/corchetes/llaves | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Stacks

def solve(s)
  st = []
  pairs = {')'=>'(', ']'=>'[', '}'=>'{'}
  s.each_char do |ch|
    if "([{".include?(ch)
      st << ch
    elsif ")]}").include?(ch)
      top = st.pop
      return false if top != pairs[ch]
    end
  end
  st.empty?
end

def solve(arr)
  seen = {}
  out = []
  arr.each do |x|
    next if seen[x]
    seen[x] = true
    out << x
  end
  out
end
snippets.C0019:
# Caso: Rotar arreglo k | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Arrays

def solve(arr, k)
  n = arr.length
  return [] if n == 0
  r = k % n
  arr[-r, r] + arr[0, n - r]
end
snippets.C0021:
# Caso: Búsqueda binaria | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Búsqueda

def solve(arr, target)
  lo=0; hi=arr.length-1
  while lo <= hi
    mid = (lo+hi)/2
    return mid if arr[mid] == target
    if arr[mid] < target
      lo = mid + 1
    else
      hi = mid - 1
    end
  end
  -1
end
snippets.C0022:
# Caso: Bubble sort | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Ordenamiento

def solve(arr)
  a = arr.dup
  n = a.length
  n.times do |i|
    (0...(n-1-i)).each do |j|
      a[j], a[j+1] = a[j+1], a[j] if a[j] > a[j+1]
    end
  end
  a
end

def solve(arr, target)
  lo=0; hi=arr.length-1
  while lo <= hi
    mid = (lo+hi)/2
    return mid if arr[mid] == target

    else
      hi = mid - 1
    end
  end
  -1
end

# Caso: Validar RUT chileno | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Validación
def solve(rut)
  clean = rut.to_s.gsub(/[.\-\s]/, '').upcase
  return false if clean.length < 2

  body = clean[0...-1]
  dv = clean[-1]

  return false unless body.match?(/^\d+$/)

  sum = 0
  mul = 2
  body.chars.reverse_each do |ch|
    sum += (ch.ord - '0'.ord) * mul
    mul = (mul == 7) ? 2 : (mul + 1)
  end

  mod = 11 - (sum % 11)
  dv_calc = (mod == 11) ? '0' : (mod == 10) ? 'K' : mod.to_s
  dv == dv_calc
end

# C0665 · Binary search (iterativo) (Básico, Algoritmos)
def solve(arr, target)
  lo = 0
  hi = arr.length - 1
  while lo <= hi
    mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    v = arr[mid]
    return mid if v == target
    if v < target
      lo = mid + 1
    else
      hi = mid - 1
    end
  end
  -1
end

# C0666 · Merge sort (Intermedio, Algoritmos)
def solve(arr)
  return arr if arr.length <= 1
  mid = arr.length / 2
  left = solve(arr[0...mid])
  right = solve(arr[mid..-1])

  out = []
  i = 0
  j = 0
  while i < left.length && j < right.length
    if left[i] <= right[j]
      out << left[i]; i += 1
    else
      out << right[j]; j += 1
    end
  end
  out.concat(left[i..-1] || []).concat(right[j..-1] || [])
end

# C0667 · BFS/DFS (grafo) (Intermedio, Algoritmos)
require "set"

# graph: { "A" => ["B","C"], "B" => ["D"], "C" => [], "D" => [] }

def bfs(graph, start)
  q = [start]
  seen = Set.new([start])
  out = []
  until q.empty?
    v = q.shift
    out << v
    (graph[v] || []).each do |n|
      next if seen.include?(n)
      seen.add(n)
      q << n
    end
  end
  out
end

def dfs(graph, start)
  seen = Set.new
  out = []
  visit = lambda do |v|
    seen.add(v); out << v
    (graph[v] || []).each { |n| visit.call(n) unless seen.include?(n) }
  end
  visit.call(start)
  out
end
snippets.C0668:
# C0668 · A* (pathfinding) (Avanzado, Algoritmos)
# grid: Array<Array<Integer>> 0=free 1=wall
# start/goal: [x,y]
def solve(grid, start, goal)
  w = grid[0].length
  h = grid.length
  hcost = ->(a,b){ (a[0]-b[0]).abs + (a[1]-b[1]).abs }
  key = ->(p){ "#{p[0]},#{p[1]}" }

  neigh = lambda do |p|
    x,y = p
    out = []
    [[1,0],[-1,0],[0,1],[0,-1]].each do |dx,dy|
      nx,ny = x+dx, y+dy
      if nx>=0 && ny>=0 && nx<w && ny<h && grid[ny][nx]==0
        out << [nx,ny]
      end
    end
    out
  end

  open = [[hcost.call(start,goal), start]]
  came = {}
  g = { key.call(start) => 0 }

  until open.empty?
    open.sort_by!{|x| x[0]}
    _, cur = open.shift
    return reconstruct(came, cur) if cur == goal

    neigh.call(cur).each do |nb|
      nk = key.call(nb)
      ng = g[key.call(cur)] + 1
      if !g.key?(nk) || ng < g[nk]
        g[nk] = ng
        came[nk] = cur
        f = ng + hcost.call(nb,goal)
        open << [f, nb]
      end
    end
  end
  []
end

def reconstruct(came, cur)
  key = ->(p){ "#{p[0]},#{p[1]}" }
  path = [cur]
  ck = key.call(cur)
  while came.key?(ck)
    cur = came[ck]
    path << cur
    ck = key.call(cur)
  end
  path.reverse
end

snippets.C0680:
# C0680 · Uso de teclado (keydown/atajos) (Intermedio, UI/Entrada)
# Ruby: stdin (Enter). Para raw mode: io/console.
def solve
  puts "Escribe una tecla y Enter (w/a/s/d, q):"
  while (line = STDIN.gets)
    line = line.strip
    next if line.empty?
    k = line[0].downcase
    break if k == "q"
    puts "Mover: arriba" if k == "w"
    puts "Mover: abajo" if k == "s"
    puts "Mover: izquierda" if k == "a"
    puts "Mover: derecha" if k == "d"
  end
end

# C0682 · Despliegue de hora activa (Básico, UI/Tiempo)
# Reloj en consola: actualiza cada segundo (Ctrl+C para salir)
def solve
  loop do
    print "\r" + Time.now.strftime("%H:%M:%S")
    $stdout.flush
    sleep 1
  end
end
